en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 31

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 31
When is governance starting for $MONA and Genesis MONA NFT holders for the first proposals?

The first governance utility for $MONA and Genesis MONA NFTs goes live next week! You can view the first two proposals on the governance forum at gov.digitalax.xyz and even begin proposing more initiatives under the four starting key verticals.
We are just finalising custom built strategies under our snapshot space before going live with full force.

There was lots of action in DeFi this week— and most of it kicked off right after the very unfortunate $130m C.R.E.A.M. Finance hack. It’s the protocols third exploit in a short timeframe and a big blow for the entire space as this hack comes in as one of the largest in value for the DeFi community.

Following on from this, Twitter drama ensured between Yearn and AAVE, with Andre Cronje claiming that the same exploit could be carried out under AAVE’s contracts…. long story short there was a lot of below the belt back and forths between different members of the core teams, Justin Sun pulled out over $4 billion from AAVE, and a resulting governance vote to remove xSUSHI as a collateral option was passed.

However you want to look at it, building in DeFi is not easy and each day comes with its new set of challenges. One thing can be said about these events though, exposing a potential vulnerability to a Twitter audience instead of an appropriate back channel seems more likely to undermine us all. It’s better to serve the bigger picture and bury some of the animosity.

I don’t think there has ever been a bigger troll or silly fail. Hands down Facebook and Zuckerberg earnt this badge with flying colors. And, in case you somehow missed the announcement about their name change to Meta, you can rewatch the entire performance below 🤢

And, for those that thing we should respond to Zuck by changing how we reference or name the metaverse— whether that be ultraverse, hyperverse…. or something else— why would we even consider handing over terrain like that? Especially to a gatekeeping, bloodthirsty walled garden like Facebook and everything else around them. The metaverse is not owned by anyone, not one individual, group, company, corporate, it’s an immersive and persistent space which we all can access and be a part of owning.
Let’s keep building an open web3 metaverse. Because that’s the only one that makes any sense.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 31

ال first حوكمة utility لـ $MONA و Genesis MONA NFTs goes live next اسبوع! You can view ال first two proposals على ال حوكمة forum at gov.digitalax.xyz و even begin proposing more initiatives under ال four starting key verticals.

Following على من this, Twitter drama ensured between Yearn و AAVE, مع Andre Cronje claiming that ال same exploit could be carried out under AAVE’s contracts…. long story short there was a lot من below ال belt back و forths between different members من ال core teams, Justin Sun pulled out over $4 billion من AAVE, و a resulting حوكمة vote الى remove xSUSHI as a collateral option was passed.

However you want الى look at it, building في DeFi is not easy و each day comes مع its جديد set من challenges. One thing can be said about these events though, exposing a potential vulnerability الى a Twitter audience instead من an appropriate back channel seems more likely الى undermine us all. و, لـ those that thing we should respond الى Zuck by changing ازاي we reference or name ال metaverse— whether that be ultraverse, hyperverse…. or something else— ليه would we even consider handing over terrain like that? Especially الى a gatekeeping, bloodthirsty walled garden like Facebook و everything else around them. ال metaverse is not owned by anyone, not one individual, group, company, corporate, it’s an immersive و persistent space which we all can access و be a part من owning.
Let’s keep building an open web3 metaverse. Because that’s ال only one that makes any sense.
